items.name_en: 【Side Trunk Handbag】 m46358 Vintage (Yellow Leather)
items.name_cn:
【Side Trunk Handbag】 m46358 Vintage (Yellow Leather)
Nicolas Ghesquière revisits Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage to create this small Side Trunk handbag. Monogram canvas is paired with leather trim, where the leather zipper pull creatively connects the iconic S-lock closure, drawing the eye together with reinforced metal corners. The wide handle and leather shoulder strap are both detachable.
Size: 21 x 14 x 6 cm

specs.rawTitle:

Nicolas Ghesquière revisits Louis Vuitton's trunk-making heritage to create this small Side Trunk handbag. The wide handle and leather shoulder strap are both detachable.
Size: 21 x 14 x 6 cm

items.name_en: 【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
items.name_cn:
【 Side Trunk Mini Handbag】 M46815 46358 Monogram
A highly stylized soft silhouette with sharp, strong edges fused with a box shape. The classic monogram pattern creates a unique look in the crowded bag market. It looks amazing worn and holds up well in any scene, offering a street-style vibe with a large capacity.
Size: 18*12.5*8cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
items.name_cn:
🆕 M47199 Dynamic Code Top-tier Original OnTheGo Small Handbag from the collaboration series between the brand and Chinese artist Sun Yitian, featuring cute duck motifs on the glossy calfskin and a deep microfiber lining echoing the original background. The top handle and detachable, adjustable shoulder strap complete the look.
	•	Monogram Reverse coated canvas with calfskin trim
	•	Calfskin
	•	Microfiber lining
	•	Metal hardware
	•	Smooth calfskin trim
	•	Hook closure
	•	Spacious capacity
	•	Zippered interior pocket
	•	Glossy calfskin trim
	•	Shoulder strap: detachable, adjustable
	•	Strap half-length: 35.2 cm
	•	Strap half-length adjustable to: 53.0 cm
	•	Handle: double handle

items.name_en: 🆕 Changed Code Chip Version Exclusive Real Photos This M13137
items.name_cn:
🆕 Changed Code Chip Version Exclusive Real Photos This M13137
Launched for the 2025 Cruise early spring runway, the Nova Small and Medium bags present a subtle mirror effect on the noble calfskin, combining a casual style with an elegant tone. Brand and Monogram canvas trim highlight classic elements, and the dazzling sliding chain makes it easy to create a refined look.
Monogram canvas trim fabric lining metal brand name
Center zip pocket
Chain: Sliding and adjustable, not removable
Chain half-length: 28.0cm
Chain half-length adjustable to: 50.0cm
Monogram canvas trim fabric lining metal brand name interior pocket
Fits laptops and A4 documents
Detailed Features Length Height Width Dimensions
Large: 37x36x10cm

items.name_en: 🆕 【Bloom Bucket Bag】M13843 Black
items.name_cn:
🆕 【Bloom Bucket Bag】M13843 Black
Combining smooth calfskin and Monogram canvas trim, it establishes its identity with a Monogram floral base and shiny metal hardware, inspired by the brand's Silhouette heel silhouette. The chic structure accommodates a phone and other daily essentials, while a detachable shoulder strap and handle offer multiple carrying options.
Size: 16 x 21 x 21 cm

items.name_en: 🆕 M24905 White
items.name_cn:
🆕 M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag
This spacious Neverfull MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, featuring colorful Monogram Blossoms. Sixty-six colorful threads, in subtle gradient colors, are interwoven to create a jacquard pattern. Attached to the long shoulder strap is a laser-engraved mirror charm. It includes a matching removable zip pocket inside. Dimensions: 31-28-14 cm.

specs.rawTitle:
🆕 M24905 White
Neverfull MM Handbag

items.name_en: 🆕 M24708 White Denim
items.name_cn:
🆕 M24708 White Denim
OnTheGo MM Handbag Nautical Series
This OnTheGo MM is part of the Nautical Capsule, made from Monogram Zph jacquard fabric created with 66 different colored threads featuring soft color gradients. To ensure durability, the fabric is treated with an invisible protective coating. Each model comes with a laser-engraved mirror charm for a touch of polish on the go. Dimensions: 35×27×14 cm
